---
applyTo: '**/*.{clj,cljs,cljc,bb,edn}'
description: 'Project-specific layout, namespace conventions, and dependency rules for the babashka-scripts repository.'
---

# Babashka Scripts — Project Conventions

Supplements global `babashka-scripting.instructions.md`. Repo-specific rules only.

## Project Layout

```
babashka-scripts/
├── src/          ← source namespaces (paths entry in bb.edn)
├── test/         ← test files (*_test.clj)
├── data/         ← static data files
├── deps/         ← vendored local deps (offline-first)
├── pods/         ← Babashka pod binaries (local only)
├── bb.edn        ← project config: paths, deps, tasks
└── API.md        ← generated by quickdoc — do not edit manually
```

## Namespace Conventions

Root segments = domain area (`online.paas.*`, `github.*`, `common.*`). CLI entry points: `*.cli` suffix or script name.

```clojure
(ns online.paas.mongo.tunnel)       ;; domain ns
(ns github.rebase-all-open-prs)     ;; CLI entry point
(ns online.paas.kafka.cli)          ;; CLI entry point
(ns common.logging)                 ;; shared util
```

## TDD — Mandatory

All new namespaces: test-first. No exceptions.

1. Write test (Red) — `test/<domain>/<service>/core_test.clj`
2. Implement minimum to pass (Green)
3. Refactor if needed
4. Commit — test + impl together

Test pure fns only: URL builders, parsers, transformers, interceptors. External systems (CLI, HTTP, Vault) → `repl.clj`.

```
test(<scope>): add <description> tests    ← separate test commit
feat(<scope>): add <namespace-name>       ← test + impl together (preferred)
```

## REPL-Driven Development

Develop + verify in REPL first, then write to file. `clj-nrepl-eval` only — never `b -e`/`b -m`/`b script.clj`.

→ `clojure-repl-workflow.instructions.md`

```shell
b nrepl-server 1667                  # start
clj-nrepl-eval --discover-ports       # verify
```

## Dependencies — Offline-First

All Clojure-ecosystem deps (Clojars) as `local/root` in `bb.edn`. Maven Central artifacts
(e.g. `org.clojure/*`) can use real Maven coords when `~/.m2/settings.xml` is configured.

**Kontext DATEV-Firewall:**
- **Maven Central** → erreichbar via `https://artifactory.datev.de/artifactory/maven-central-mirror`
  (bb.edn `:mvn/repos` bereits konfiguriert, `~/.m2/settings.xml` mit Token nötig)
- **Clojars** (`clojars.org/repo`) → kein DATEV-Proxy, **muss als `:local/root` verwaltet werden**

```edn
;; ✅ Korrekt für Clojars-Bibliotheken
{medley/medley {:local/root "c:\\Users\\T06057A\\.m2\\...\\medley-1.3.0.jar"}}

;; ✅ Möglich für reine Maven-Central-Bibliotheken (org.clojure/*)
{org.clojure/data.zip {:mvn/version "1.0.0"}}

;; ❌ Vermeiden für Clojars-Bibliotheken — kein Proxy vorhanden
{medley/medley {:mvn/version "1.3.0"}}
```

- `quickdoc-links.instructions.md` — docstring formatting
- `malli-specs.instructions.md` — Malli schemas
- `bb.edn` — authoritative task and dep list
